---
title: Two authors, each with their own affiliations
format:
  jss-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
author:
  - name: Alice Researcher
    email: alice@acme.edu
    affiliations:
      - name: ACME University
        city: Springfield
        country: USA
  - name: Bob Builder
    email: bob@buildlab.edu
    affiliations:
      - Builder Lab
keywords: [test]
---

Test body paragraph.
